name: Roof Damage Verification Protocol
purpose: Provide a structured method for documenting roof damage observations, evidence quality, non-storm indicators, documentation defects, and recommended review actions.
privacy_rules: Do not include homeowner names in public examples.
Do not include claim numbers in public examples.
Do not include exact residential addresses in public examples.
Remove EXIF location metadata from public media.
Do not publish third-party reports unless you have permission and have redacted sensitive details.

citations.title: Inspector Roofing AI Protocol Authority Page
